author: disparatedan
description: Visualise and navigate a family tree built from person notes in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Dan Pusceddu
manifest.description: Visualise and navigate a family tree built from person notes in your vault.
manifest.name: Arbor Family Tree

name: Arbor Family Tree

releases.author: DisparateDan
releases.description:
New Features

- Added CSV export command (companion to the existing CSV import)
- Obsidian theme integration — the tree now respects the vault's active theme colours

Bug Fixes

- Fixed child edges anchoring incorrectly: now anchors to the specific parent card in multi-spouse units, and to the unit midpoint for standard couples
- Fixed the colour lines toggle being suppressed for single-child parents
- Fixed duplicate person cards appearing when a person was reachable via two traversal paths
- Fixed the Create Person dialog to accept a first name or family name alone (previously required both)
- Fixed person name fields rendering literally rather than being reformatted
- Fixed the "show all siblings" button label to be consistent under pedigree collapse
- Fixed pedigree collapse detection: the show-all-siblings button is now disabled (rather than broken) when pedigree collapse is present
- Fixed NaN in sort comparators (retained from a reverted birth_order feature)
- Tightened object guards before String() calls in tree and GEDCOM modules to prevent crashes on malformed data
- Fixed SVG output to escape user data (security fix)
- Removed deprecated detachLeavesOfType API call
- Fixed modal picker bug and addressed ObsidianReviewBot required issues

Documentation

- Added Tudor dynasty example tree with screenshots to README
- Documented the pedigree collapse limitation
